description_long: This kiosk is a modular, enclosed commercial booth with a modern, minimalist design, featuring clean white exterior panels and large printed graphics. The front side displays a prominent black and blue illuminated sign with both English and Chinese text, as well as a logo and branding on the side wall. The interior is carpeted in a deep red color and contains tables and chairs for customer interaction, along with shelving and partitioned spaces for organization. The structure is boxy with a flat roof and no visible windows, emphasizing privacy and focused engagement. The kiosk is designed for use in exhibition halls, trade shows, or urban commercial environments, providing a professional and inviting space for information and transactions.
description: A modern, enclosed commercial kiosk with white paneled walls, illuminated signage, and a carpeted interior featuring tables and chairs. The design is boxy and minimalist, suitable for trade shows or urban commercial use.
description_view_0: The side view shows a large printed logo and branding, a partial view of the interior with tables and chairs, and a clean white exterior with graphic accents.
description_view_1: The rear view displays plain white panels with no signage or windows, emphasizing the kiosk's enclosed and private nature.
description_view_2: This side view reveals more of the kiosk's structural layout, including shelving and partitioned spaces, with a focus on the solid white exterior.
description_view_3: The front view features a prominent illuminated sign with English and Chinese text, an information desk, and visible interior furnishings, making it the main point of entry and interaction.
attribute_signage_type: Illuminated digital sign above the entrance with English and Chinese text, printed logo and branding on side panels.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open entryway at the front.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with no visible overhangs or decorative elements, constructed from the same composite panels as the walls.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with clean lines and functional design.
